description: Resolve sprint-10 leftovers: add userId to Clinic schema, add findByUserId to ClinicsService and ProfessionalsService, wire AttendantsService/Controller into ClinicsModule, create missing attendant unit tests, and register all accumulated modules in AppModule.

context.dependencies: Sprint 10 must be complete before running these prompts
notes: The Clinic schema currently lacks a userId field — AttendantsService.assertClinicOwnership and ProfileService.updateClinicProfile both depend on clinic.userId existing.
findByUserId is called by ProfileService on both ClinicsService and ProfessionalsService but does not exist in either.
AttendantsService and AttendantsController exist on disk but are not registered in ClinicsModule.
config/configuration.ts already exists with the ses block but ConfigModule.forRoot has no load: [] option — configService.get('ses') returns undefined at runtime.

prompts.name: clinic-userId-and-findByUserId
prompts.description: Add userId to Clinic schema and add findByUserId to ClinicsService and ProfessionalsService
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read ALL THREE files. Follow all conventions in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

Context: ProfileService calls clinicsService.findByUserId(userId) and professionalsService.findByUserId(userId), but neither method exists. The Clinic schema also lacks a userId field, which AttendantsService.assertClinicOwnership depends on.

Step 1 — Update apps/api/src/clinics/schemas/clinic.schema.ts:
- Import Types from 'mongoose'
- Add to the Clinic class:
  @Prop({ type: Types.ObjectId, ref: 'User' }) userId?: Types.ObjectId;
- After SchemaFactory.createForClass(Clinic), add an index:
  ClinicSchema.index({ userId: 1 }, { sparse: true });
- Do NOT change any existing field.

Step 2 — Update apps/api/src/clinics/clinics.service.ts:
- Add after the existing remove() method:
  async findByUserId(userId: string): Promise<ClinicDocument>
  - if (!Types.ObjectId.isValid(userId)) throw new NotFoundException(`Clinic for user ${userId} not found`)
  - const clinic = await this.clinicModel.findOne({ userId: new Types.ObjectId(userId) }).exec()
  - if (!clinic) throw new NotFoundException(`Clinic for user ${userId} not found`)
  - return clinic
- Do NOT change any existing method.

Step 3 — Update apps/api/src/professionals/professionals.service.ts:
- Add after the existing remove() method:
  async findByUserId(userId: string): Promise<ProfessionalDocument>
  - if (!Types.ObjectId.isValid(userId)) throw new NotFoundException(`Professional for user ${userId} not found`)
  - const professional = await this.professionalModel.findOne({ userId: new Types.ObjectId(userId) }).exec()
  - if (!professional) throw new NotFoundException(`Professional for user ${userId} not found`)
  - return professional
- Note: the Professional schema already has userId as a required unique field.
- Do NOT change any existing method.

prompts.name: clinics-module-attendants-registration
prompts.description: Register AttendantsService and AttendantsController in ClinicsModule and add the User model to its MongooseModule.forFeature
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the file. Follow all conventions in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

Context: AttendantsService (apps/api/src/clinics/services/attendants.service.ts) and AttendantsController (apps/api/src/clinics/controllers/attendants.controller.ts) were created in sprint 10 but were never registered in ClinicsModule. AttendantsService injects the User model via @InjectModel('User'), so the User schema must be available in this module.

Update apps/api/src/clinics/clinics.module.ts:
1. Add to imports:
   - import { User, UserSchema } from '../auth/schemas/user.schema'
   - import { AttendantsService } from './services/attendants.service'
   - import { AttendantsController } from './controllers/attendants.controller'
2. In MongooseModule.forFeature([...]) add: { name: User.name, schema: UserSchema }
3. Add AttendantsService to the providers array.
4. Add AttendantsController to the controllers array.
5. Do NOT add AttendantsService to exports — it is only used within this module.
6. Do NOT change the existing exports: [ClinicsService, MongooseModule].

prompts.name: attendants-service-tests
prompts.description: Create the missing unit test file for AttendantsService (was listed in sprint-10 spec but never generated)
prompts.request:
Before writing, read apps/api/src/clinics/services/attendants.service.ts to understand the implementation. Follow all conventions in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md — especially the constructor function mock pattern for Mongoose models.

Create apps/api/src/clinics/tests/attendants.service.spec.ts:

Setup:
- Mock bcrypt: jest.mock('bcrypt', () => ({ hash: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue('hashed-password') }))
- mockClinicsService = { findById: jest.fn() }
- mockUserModel: use constructor function pattern (MockUserModel) with static methods:
  MockUserModel.find = jest.fn()
  MockUserModel.findOneAndUpdate = jest.fn()
  MockUserModel.create = jest.fn()
  MockUserModel.deleteOne = jest.fn()
- Helper: buildExec(value) = { exec: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(value), select: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(), sort: jest.fn().mockReturnThis() }
- afterEach(() => jest.clearAllMocks())

Clinic ownership helper mocks:
- const ownedClinic = { _id: new Types.ObjectId().toString(), userId: currentUserId }
- const foreignClinic = { _id: new Types.ObjectId().toString(), userId: 'other-user-id' }

Tests (10 total):
1. 'createAttendant — creates user with hashed password and role ATTENDANT'
   - mockClinicsService.findById resolves ownedClinic
   - MockUserModel.create resolves the created user
   - Verify create called with { role: Role.ATTENDANT, clinicId, passwordHash: 'hashed-password', ... }
   - Verify returned user has no passwordHash field

2. 'createAttendant — throws ConflictException on duplicate username'
   - mockClinicsService.findById resolves ownedClinic
   - MockUserModel.create rejects with { code: 11000 }
   - Expect ConflictException

3. 'createAttendant — throws ForbiddenException when current user does not own the clinic'
   - mockClinicsService.findById resolves foreignClinic
   - Expect ForbiddenException

4. 'listAttendants — returns attendants of that clinic sorted by displayName, no passwordHash'
   - mockClinicsService.findById resolves ownedClinic
   - MockUserModel.find returns buildExec([{ displayName: 'Ana' }, { displayName: 'Bruno' }])
   - Verify find called with { role: Role.ATTENDANT, clinicId }

5. 'listAttendants — throws ForbiddenException when current user does not own the clinic'
   - mockClinicsService.findById resolves foreignClinic
   - Expect ForbiddenException

6. 'updateAttendant — updates displayName and isActive'
   - mockClinicsService.findById resolves ownedClinic
   - MockUserModel.findOneAndUpdate returns buildExec({ displayName: 'Updated' })
   - Verify findOneAndUpdate called with correct query { _id, role: ATTENDANT, clinicId }

7. 'updateAttendant — rehashes password when dto.password is provided'
   - Verify bcrypt.hash called with dto.password, 12
   - Verify update object contains passwordHash: 'hashed-password'

8. 'updateAttendant — does NOT call bcrypt.hash when dto.password is not provided'
   - Verify bcrypt.hash NOT called

9. 'removeAttendant — returns { success: true } on success'
   - mockClinicsService.findById resolves ownedClinic
   - MockUserModel.deleteOne resolves { deletedCount: 1 }
   - Expect result to equal { success: true }

10. 'removeAttendant — throws NotFoundException when attendant not found'
    - mockClinicsService.findById resolves ownedClinic
    - MockUserModel.deleteOne resolves { deletedCount: 0 }
    - Expect NotFoundException

prompts.name: wire-modules-and-config
prompts.description: Register all accumulated modules in AppModule and enable the configuration factory so configService.get('ses') works at runtime
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read apps/api/src/app.module.ts carefully. Follow all conventions in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

Context: apps/api/src/config/configuration.ts already exists and exports a factory with database, redis, jwt, and ses blocks. However ConfigModule.forRoot has no load: [] option, so configService.get('ses') returns undefined at runtime. Additionally, 7 modules created in sprints 03–10 are not imported in AppModule, making their endpoints unreachable.

Update apps/api/src/app.module.ts:

Step 1 — Import the configuration factory:
  import configuration from './config/configuration'

Step 2 — Add load: [configuration] to ConfigModule.forRoot:
  ConfigModule.forRoot({ isGlobal: true, load: [configuration] })

Step 3 — Import and add ALL of the following modules to the imports array (each file is confirmed to exist on disk):
  - import { AppointmentsModule } from './appointments/appointments.module'
  - import { SubscriptionsModule } from './subscriptions/subscriptions.module'
  - import { ChatModule } from './chat/chat.module'
  - import { SearchModule } from './search/search.module'
  - import { AvailabilityModule } from './availability/availability.module'
  - import { PatientsModule } from './patients/patients.module'
  - import { ProfileModule } from './profile/profile.module'

Step 4 — Add all 7 module classes to the imports array inside @Module.

Do NOT change MongooseModule, RedisModule, AuthModule, UsersModule, ClinicsModule, ProfessionalsModule, ClinicProfessionalsModule or any other existing import.
